When_files_are_added_or_modified.description: Polls the configured SFTP folder for new or modified files.

Patch_delivery_count.description: True duplicate: increment deliveryCount, append deliveryHistory, update lastDeliveredAt.

Copy_dup_to_processed.description: Copies true duplicate file from /in/ to /processed/.

Delete_dup_from_in.description: Deletes duplicate file from /in/ after copy to /processed/.

Patch_content_update.description: Content update: update contentHash, increment version + deliveryCount, append deliveryHistory.

Compare_content_hash.description: Compare blob ContentMD5 with stored contentHash: same = true duplicate, different = content update.

Log_new_file.inputs: New file detected: @{triggerOutputs()?['headers']['x-ms-file-name']}. Proceeding with intake.

runError.message: Unexpected error during duplicate check: @{coalesce(actions('Check_for_duplicate')?['error']?['message'], string(outputs('Check_for_duplicate')?['statusCode']), 'Unknown error')}

Copy_err_to_failed.description: Copies file to /failed/ on unexpected duplicate-check error.

Delete_err_from_in.description: Deletes file from /in/ after copy to /failed/ on dedup error.

Check_if_new_file.description: Distinguishes expected 404 (new file) from unexpected errors (network, DB issues).

Handle_duplicate_check.description: 3-way routing: Succeeded â†’ compare contentHash (dup vs update); 404 â†’ new file; other â†’ error.

Get_file_content.description: Downloads the file content from the SFTP server.

Generate_file_id.description: Generates a unique file ID for the SFTP record.

Strip_file_extension.description: Removes the file extension to get the base filename for metadata parsing.

Parse_filename_parts.description: Splits base filename by delimiter to extract metadata: [0]Account, [1]Fund, [2]DocType, [3]DocName, [4]PublishedDate, [5]EffectiveDate.

Upload_to_blob.description: Backs up the file to blob storage at /attachments/{fileId}/{filename}.

Get_blob_md5.description: Fetches blob properties via REST API to retrieve Content-MD5 hash (not returned by the managed connector Create blob response).

Compute_dedup_key.description: Computes base64-encoded dedup key from file path for duplicate detection.

Scope_Early_Processing.description: Wraps early processing actions (file download through dedup key computation) for consolidated error handling.

Create_intake_record.description: Creates the initial Cosmos DB intake record with parsed metadata, contentHash, version: 1, deliveryCount: 1.

Create_intake_record_if_new.description: Only creates a new Cosmos DB record for new files (404). Content updates are already patched in Handle_duplicate_check.

Upload_to_SharePoint.description: Uploads spreadsheet file to SharePoint via Graph API PUT at /{letter}/{Account}/{Fund}/{filename}.

Compose_Service_Bus_Message.description: Builds the Service Bus message payload for PDF classification. dedupKey matches the Cosmos DB document id.

Send_to_Service_Bus.description: Sends SFTP intake message to intake queue for PDF classification.

Log_unsupported_type.inputs: Unsupported file type '@{outputs('Parse_file_extension')}' for file @{triggerOutputs()?['headers']['x-ms-file-name']}. Skipping.
Log_unsupported_type.description: Logs warning for unsupported file types. File is not moved to archive.

Check_if_PDF.description: Routes PDF files to Service Bus queue for agent classification.

Check_if_spreadsheet.description: Routes spreadsheet files (csv, xls, xlsx) to SharePoint via Graph API.

Scope_Route_File.description: Wraps downstream processing (record creation + file routing) for consolidated error handling.

Copy_to_processed.description: Copies the processed file from /in/ to /processed/.

Update_Cosmos_processed.description: Updates Cosmos DB record with disposition: processed.

Delete_from_in.description: Deletes the file from SFTP /in/ after successful disposition to /processed/.

Terminate_success.description: Terminates with Succeeded after successful processing and disposition.

Delete_unsupported_from_in.description: Deletes unsupported file from /in/ (matching existing delete behavior).

Terminate_skipped.description: Unsupported file type — deleted from /in/, no disposition set.

Check_if_supported_type.description: Routes supported types (csv, xlsx, xls, pdf) to success disposition. Unsupported types are deleted from /in/.

Copy_to_failed.description: Copies file to /failed/ when downstream processing fails.

Filter_failed_actions.description: Filters Scope_Route_File results to find the failed action for error details.

Update_Cosmos_failed.description: Updates Cosmos DB record with status: error, disposition: failed, and errorDetails.

Delete_from_in_on_failure.description: Deletes file from /in/ after copy to /failed/ on processing failure.

Terminate_failed.description: Terminates with Failed status after file disposition to /failed/.

Copy_early_to_failed.description: Copies file to /failed/ when early processing fails (before dedup key computation).

Delete_early_from_in.description: Deletes file from /in/ after copy to /failed/ on early failure.

runError.message: @{coalesce(actions('Scope_Early_Processing')?['error']?['message'], 'Early processing failed before dedup key computation')}

Terminate_early_failed.description: Terminates with Failed after early processing failure. No Cosmos DB update (metadata not yet computed).
